extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - 120+ scrapers, Stremio, Trakt, Debrid, Live Movie Channels
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 120+ scrapers providing maximum coverage for movies and TV shows.
=== FREE STREAMS (No Debrid Required) === - VidSrc Network: VidSrc.xyz, VidSrc.cc, VidSrc.in, VidSrc.pm, VidSrc.nl, VidSrc.pro, VidSrc.me, VidSrc.to - Embed Services: 2Embed, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay, MoviesAPI, SmashyStream - Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, 123Movies, MoviesJoy, Putlocker - And 40+ more free streaming sources!
=== STREMIO FREE ADDONS === - Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - KnightCrawler, Jackettio, AIOStreams, Torrentio (Free Mode) - PlutoTV, Tubi, and more!
=== TORRENT SITES === - Primary: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, ThePirateBay, SolidTorrents - Secondary: LimeTorrents, Torrentz2, RARBG, Kickass, MagnetDL, iDope - Additional: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, and more!
=== ANIME === - Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe - Nyaa, SubsPlease, AnimeTosho, and more!
=== ASIAN DRAMA === - WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad
=== INTERNATIONAL === - Russian: RuTracker, RuTor, NNM-Club - Chinese: DyTT, BTBTT - French: Torrent9, YggTorrent
=== STREMIO DEBRID SCRAPERS === - Torrentio, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix, Annatar, PeerFlix, EasyNews+
=== FEATURES === - Live Movie Channels with EPG (35+ channels) - Episode Countdown Tracker - Network Browser (Netflix, HBO, BBC, etc.) - Returning Shows (New Seasons) - AI-Powered Natural Language Search - Trakt Integration with Scrobbling - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration - Pre-scrape on Hover - Source Caching
Revived and massively expanded by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
extension.news:
v2.8.0 (2026-01-15) - MASSIVE SCRAPER EXPANSION - Added: 75+ NEW SCRAPERS bringing total to 120+ sources! - Added: VidSrc Network (8 mirrors): xyz, cc, in, pm, nl, pro, me, to - Added: 2Embed variants, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay - Added: MoviesAPI, SmashyStream, NontonGo, RgShorts/RiveStream - Added: Stremio Free Addons: Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - Added: KnightCrawler, Jackettio, Orionoid, TPBPlus, AIOStreams, StremThru, MediaFlow - Added: Torrentio Free Mode, PlutoTV, Tubi integration - Added: 20+ Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, etc. - Added: Additional Torrents: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, YggTorrent, Torrent9 - Added: 12+ Anime Sources: Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe, etc. - Added: Asian Drama: WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad - Improved: Settings organized by category for easier management - Improved: Source discovery with parallel scraping support
v2.7.2 (2026-01-12) - Added: Movie Schedules - View what's playing on all movie channels for the next 12 hours - Added: Force Refresh EPG button in Movie Channels menu - Added: Returning Shows - Browse TV shows with new seasons starting in next 30 days - Added: Network Browser - Browse TV shows by network (Netflix, HBO, BBC, Amazon, Disney+, Apple TV+, and 20+ more) - Added: Episode Countdown - Track your favorite shows and see days until next episode - Added: Context menu "Track Episode Countdown" on all TV shows - Added: TODAY/TOMORROW/X days countdown indicators - Improved: EPG now shows unique movies per channel based on genre
v2.7.1 (2026-01-12) - Fixed: EPG now shows unique movies for each channel (no more duplicate listings) - Fixed: Each movie channel pulls from TMDB based on genre (Action, Comedy, Thriller, etc.) - Added: Channel logos/icons for all 35+ movie channels - Added: New Preferences settings category - Added: "Show International Premieres" setting - toggle Japanese, Chinese, Korean shows - Changed: Latest Show Premieres now defaults to English/American shows only - Added: Country indicators on international show premieres when enabled
v2.7.0 (2026-01-10) - Added: Live Movie Channels with EPG support (35+ channels worldwide) - Added: EPG integration showing current and next programs - Added: Watch Live or Start from Beginning choice for channels - Added: New Episodes Today calendar (scroll back up to 7 days) - Added: Latest Show Premieres with infinite pagination (50 items/page, last 7 days) - Added: Smart movie stream finding when clicking on live channels
